case_title: PRESSURE GROUT COMPANY VS TAPLIN A. RUSSELL MR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.30 FILED BY PRESSURE GROUT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT TAPLIN A. RUSSELL MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-06-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04 TRIAL OF JUN-02-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TAPLIN A. RUSSELL MR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRESSURE GROUT COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAPLIN A. RUSSELL MR. $2,500.30 PRINCIPAL, $33.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,533.30, COURT FINDS DEFT. AGREED TO INCREASE CAST AS PROVIDED IN WRITTEN CONTRACT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TAPLIN A. RUSSELL MR.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,566.08 AS TO DEFENDANT TAPLIN A. RUSSELL MR.
